X# New ports collection makefile for:   siteatschool
X# Date created:		16 March 2008
X# Whom:			Wen heping <wenheping@gmail.com>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	siteatschool
XPORTVERSION=	2.4.10
XCATEGORIES=	www
XMASTER_SITES=	SF
X
XMAINTAINER=	wenheping@gmail.com
XCOMMENT=	A CMS to manage and maintain the website of a school
X
XUSE_PHP=	mysql
XUSE_ZIP=	yes
XSUB_FILES=	pkg-message
XSUB_LIST=	SSDIR=${SSDIR}
XNO_BUILD=	yes
XSSDIR?=		www/siteatschool
XNO_WRKSUBDIR=	yes
X
X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
X
Xdo-install:
X	@cd ${WRKDIR} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} starnet ${WWWDIR}
X	@cd ${WRKDIR} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} agenda ${WWWDIR}
X	@cd ${WRKDIR} && ${INSTALL_SCRIPT} index.php ${WWWDIR}
X	@${CHOWN} -R ${WWWOWN}:${WWWGRP} ${WWWDIR}/starnet
X	@${CHMOD} -R 755 ${WWWDIR}/starnet
X	@${CHOWN} -R ${WWWOWN}:${WWWGRP} ${WWWDIR}/agenda
X	@${CHMOD} -R 755 ${WWWDIR}/agenda
X	@${CHOWN} ${WWWOWN}:${WWWGRP} ${WWWDIR}/index.php
X	@${CHMOD} 755 ${WWWDIR}/index.php
X
Xpost-install:
X	@${ECHO_CMD} '@exec ${CHOWN} -R ${WWWOWN}:${WWWGRP} ${WWWDIR}/starnet' \
X		>> ${TMPPLIST}
X	@${ECHO_CMD} '@exec ${CHMOD} 755 -R ${WWWDIR}/starnet' \
X		>> ${TMPPLIST}
X	@${ECHO_CMD} '@exec ${CHOWN} -R ${WWWOWN}:${WWWGRP} ${WWWDIR}/agenda' \
X		>> ${TMPPLIST}
X	@${ECHO_CMD} '@exec ${CHMOD} 755 -R ${WWWDIR}/agenda' \
X		>> ${TMPPLIST}
X	@${ECHO_CMD} '@exec ${CHOWN} -R ${WWWOWN}:${WWWGRP} ${WWWDIR}/index.php' \
X		>> ${TMPPLIST}
X	@${ECHO_CMD} '@exec ${CHMOD} 755 ${WWWDIR}/index.php' \
X		>> ${TMPPLIST}
X	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
X
X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
END-of-/usr/ports/www/siteatschool/Makefile

XSite@School is a Content Management System(CMS)
X to manage and maintain the website of a primary 
Xschool. It can manage the schools website without
Xtechnical knowledge, edit the webpages with a 
XWord processor like editor.Pupils and teachers 
Xcan have personal pages on the website, and 
Xteachers can check pupil pages before publication.
X
XWWW: http://www.siteatschool.org
END-of-/usr/ports/www/siteatschool/pkg-descr

X=========================================
XCongratulation! You have installed Siteatschool,
XFirst, Add the following to your Apache 
Xconfiguration, and  restart the server:
X
X### Add the AcceptPathInfo directive only for Apache 2.0.30 or later.
X Alias /siteatschool %%PREFIX%%/%%SSDIR%%/
X  AcceptPathInfo On  <Directory %%PREFIX%%/%%SSDIR%%/>
X      AllowOverride None
X      Order Allow,Deny
X      Allow from all
X   </Directory>
X
XThen visit your S@S site with a browser (i.e.,
Xhttp://your.server.com/siteatschool/starnet/install), 
Xand you should be lead through creating a config 
Xfile and then setting up S@S, creating an admin 
Xaccount, etc.
X
XMore information about the installation ,
Xplease visit:
X
Xhttp://siteatschool.org/man2.4/install.html
X===========================================
END-of-/usr/ports/www/siteatschool/files/pkg-message.in
